title: Action Bars, Titles & Tab Lists
description: Learn how to send messages to players using action bars, titles, and customize the player tab list.

lessons.title: Action Bar Messages
lessons.content:
## Introduction
Action bars are short messages that appear above the player's hotbar for a few seconds.

### Example: Send an Action Bar Message
```java
player.sendActionBar(Component.text("§aYou received a buff!"));
```

### Logic Explanation
- `sendActionBar` displays temporary messages.
- `Component.text()` allows color codes and formatting.

### Edge Cases & Warnings
- Messages are short-lived (3-5 seconds).
- Frequent updates can cause flickering.
- Only visible to the player receiving it.

quiz.question: Where does an action bar message appear?
Which class is used to format colored text?

lessons.title: Titles and Subtitles
lessons.content:
## Introduction
Titles are large messages displayed in the center of the screen, often with subtitles.

### Example: Send Title and Subtitle
```java
player.showTitle(Title.title(
    Component.text("§6Welcome!"),
    Component.text("§eEnjoy your adventure"),
    Title.Times.of(Duration.ofSeconds(1), Duration.ofSeconds(3), Duration.ofSeconds(1))
));
```

### Logic Explanation
- `Title.title(main, subtitle, times)` sends both main title and subtitle.
- `Title.Times.of(fadeIn, stay, fadeOut)` controls animation duration.

### Edge Cases & Warnings
- Use short messages for clarity.
- Overusing titles can annoy players.
- Titles override previous titles until faded out.

quiz.question: Which method sends a title to a player?
Which duration is for the message to stay visible?

lessons.title: Customizing Player Tab List
lessons.content:
## Introduction
The tab list shows all online players; you can customize header, footer, and even individual names.

### Example: Set Tab Header and Footer
```java
player.sendPlayerListHeaderAndFooter(
    Component.text("§6Welcome to the Server"),
    Component.text("§eHave fun!"));
```

### Logic Explanation
- `sendPlayerListHeaderAndFooter(header, footer)` updates the tab list.
- Components allow colors, formatting, and line breaks.
- You can update periodically for dynamic effects.

### Edge Cases & Warnings
- Keep messages short; long headers can look bad.
- Avoid frequent updates to prevent packet spam.
- Different Minecraft versions may handle line breaks differently.

quiz.question: Which method updates the tab list header and footer?
Why avoid frequent updates to tab list?
Can tab list messages include colors?
